name: copy_constraints
short_description: creates a copy of given constraint set
full_help:
copy_constraints

Description: 
creates a copy of given constraint set

Syntax: 
copy_constraints  [-constrset <arg>] [-quiet] [-verbose] <name>

Returns: 
returns the copied constraint set object

Usage: 
  Name          Description
  -------------------------
  [-constrset]  Contraint FileSet from which files are copied
  [-quiet]      Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]    Suspend message limits during command execution
  <name>        Name of the copied constraint set

Categories: 
Project

arguments.description: Contraint FileSet from which files are copied
Suspend message limits during command execution
